title: Classes With at Least 5 Students
description: Bảng Courses(student, class). Trả các class có ≥5 học sinh (student có thể trùng class).
approach: SELECT class FROM Courses GROUP BY class HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT student) >= 5 (hoặc COUNT(*) nếu mỗi row unique).
memoryTip: Classes 5+ students = GROUP BY class HAVING COUNT >= 5.

solutions.python:
# SQL
SELECT class
FROM Courses
GROUP BY class
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5;
solutions.c: /* SQL GROUP BY HAVING — xem SQL */

analysis.correctness: GROUP BY class đếm enrollment đủ 5.
edgeCases: Student trùng class nhiều lần — dùng DISTINCT nếu cần
